description: You are a quantitative analyst at a risk management firm. Your team needs a volatility forecasting model for the S&P 500 ETF (SPY) to support daily VaR (Value-at-Risk) reporting using historical price data from /home/ga/RProjects/datasets/spy_prices.csv. Create an R script at /home/ga/RProjects/garch_analysis.R that fits a GARCH(1,1) model (sGARCH variance, ARMA(1,0) mean, 'norm' distribution) using the rugarch package to SPY log-returns. The script must output 1-day VaR estimates at 95% and 99% confidence levels to /home/ga/RProjects/output/spy

metadata.task_note: Uses rugarch (CRAN) + real SPY ETF price data from Yahoo Finance
